issue.title: Checkout fails when coupon code contains lowercase letters
issue.body: Customers report that applying coupon codes like summer10 fails, while SUMMER10 works. The checkout page shows a generic payment error instead of a coupon validation message.

comments.author: support-engineer
comments.body: Reproduced on staging with coupon summer10. Network response says INVALID_COUPON_FORMAT.

files.content: export function applyCoupon(code: string) { return code.toUpperCase(); }
export async function chargePayment() { return true; }
import { describe, expect, it } from 'vitest'; describe('applyCoupon', () => { it('accepts uppercase coupons', () => {}); });

# Checkout Service

Express service for checkout, coupon validation, and payment handoff.

name: ci
on: [push, pull_request]
jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: pnpm test
